methodology.medicaid: Net Revenue from Medicaid from CMS hospital cost reports
methodology.medicare: Estimated from Medicare IPPS payment components plus Medicare inpatient day-share proxy, capped by total net patient revenue
methodology.federal_state_split: State-level FMAP percentages from Federal Register FY 2026 table
methodology.chain_grouping: CMS PECOS hospital ownership mapping (owner organizations with >=2 hospitals), then facility-name keyword fallback and optional manual overrides
methodology.emma_mapping: Facility-level not-for-profit issuer mapping sourced from data/manual/emma_issuer_map.csv
methodology.private_insurance: Private revenue modeled from residual other revenue and ownership priors; state insurer market shares from CMS Medical Loss Ratio public use files

sources.name: CMS Medical Loss Ratio Public Use Files
